textEn: and when the stars fall, scattered,
and when the seas burst forth,
and when the graves are overturned,
then each soul will come to know what it has done or what it has left undone.

textAr: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
textEn: O mankind, what has lured you away from your Lord, the Most Generous,
textTranslit: Yaaa ayyuhal insaaanu maa gharraka bi Rabbikal kareem

textEn: Who created you, then shaped and proportioned you,

textAr: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
textEn: and assembled you in whatever form He willed?
textTranslit: Feee ayye sooratim maa shaaa'a rakkabak

textEn: No indeed; but you deny the Judgment Day,
while there are watchers over you,
Indeed, the righteous will be in Bliss,
and the wicked will be in Blazing Fire,
which they will enter on Judgment Day,
and will never come out of it.
How do you know what Judgment Day is?
textTranslit: Wa maaa adraaka maa Yawmud Deen

textAr: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
textEn: Again, how do you know what Judgment Day is?
textTranslit: Summa maaa adraaka maa Yawmud Deen

textAr: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
textEn: It is the Day when no soul will be of any help to another, and all command on that Day will be with Allah.
textTranslit: Yawma laa tamliku nafsul linafsin shai'anw walamru yawma'izil lillaah
